name: zero_block_size_collision
reason: block_size=0 is not excluded by the preconditions, so distinct block indices map to the same address, causing block collisions

name: result_at_segment_boundary
reason: The <= in the precondition allows the result to land exactly at segment_start + SEGMENT_SIZE, one byte past the segment's valid range

name: cross_segment_block_aliasing
reason: The spec provides no uniqueness guarantee across segments; blocks from different segments can compute to the same address

name: page_idx_beyond_segment
reason: The preconditions do not bound page_id.idx < SLICES_PER_SEGMENT, allowing pages to start at or beyond the segment end
output_tail:
...
192 |         page_start(page_id) >= segment_start(page_id.segment_id) + SEGMENT_SIZE,
    |         ^^^^^^^^^^---------
    |         |
    |         call expression requires function

error: aborting due to 1 previous error

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0618`.

name: redundant_postcondition
reason: The two ensures clauses are algebraically equivalent given the precondition, so the spec provides only one independent guarantee rather than two
